normal.description: Steady-state telemetry for all devices with realistic drift.

cold-chain breach.description: Intermittent high temperature excursions across the fleet.

unstable battery.description: Accelerated battery drain and noisy connectivity.

offline/recovery.description: Periodic offline windows followed by recovery windows.

multi-device burst.description: Publish multiple samples for each device per loop cycle.

transport instability.description: Transport boxes show stronger swings from movement and handling.

prolonged door-open incident.description: Sustained door-open events causing thermal and humidity rise.

repeated breach pattern.description: Predictable breach/normal cadence suitable for escalation logic demos.

demo-friendly.description: Guaranteed visible events in short demo windows.
